AI Workflow Automation

Inrō handles your Instagram DMs like a human would. It engages your audience, answers questions, qualifies leads, sells, and follows up on its own. Includes DM campaigns, CRM, comment-to-DM flows, and automations with AI at every step, making every flow more personal and higher converting. Connect via MCP, API, and integrations with Shopify, Stripe, Calendly & 8,000+ tools. Smartest in the market. Meta-approved, 10,000+ users.

 Overview

 Reviews16

Subscribe [...] View all

4.9

Based on 16 reviews

Review Inrō?

Reviewers largely see Inrō as an easy, practical Instagram automation tool that saves time and improves engagement, conversions, and campaign management. They repeatedly praise the simple setup, intuitive workflows, and responsive support, with several saying it quickly replaced manual DM work. More detailed feedback highlights AI-based DM automation and lead qualification as a real step up from rigid rule-based bots, especially for creator, brand, and e-commerce use. Criticism is limited but specific: users want broader social network support, more profile customization, and better community features.

#### What's great

Averi isn’t just another AI tool, it’s the AI Marketing Workspace that us marketers have been waiting for. It’s where strategy, creation, and execution finally happen in one flow. I’ve used every marketing AI under the sun, and nothing comes close to how Averi blends human expertise with AI intelligence. It actually thinks with you.

If you run marketing or wear ten hats at once, this is the workspace that makes it all click.

results.title: AI for marketers: 26 AI-powered tools to increase ROI | Product Hunt
results.content:
3. AI-powered apps like Booltool, Charlie and Product Launch AI can help you efficiently create multi-channel social media campaigns from cornerstone text, audio, or video content and generate copy variations to help you achieve your launch goals.

4. Mokker Instantoffers handy one-click AI-background replacement for any image.

5. AI for Sheets by Cargo integrates OpenAI’s ChatGPT with sheets to help marketing teams automate customer messaging and make spreadsheet-based workflows faster.

  

## Refine: AI apps for measuring and refining your marketing strategy

1. Use an AI Writer like Laxis 2.0 to automatically generate meeting memos, follow up emails, customer requirements, and project updates. [...] ## Execute: AI apps for defining your marketing channel mix, creating an SEO’d content strategy, and utilizing social and paid media

1. Scalenutautomates the entire content lifecycle with AI, including: keyword planning, NLP powered topic research, AI writing assistance, content optimization and publishing.

2. AI brainstorming tools like AI Powered YouTube Idea Generator and GPT-3 Blog Idea Generator, paired with AI content generators like Synthesys X, AI Photo, Memorable Ad Maker, Femme Stock, Predis.ai, Astria Video and Tweet to Video by Fliki can help you create high-quality content and multimedia creative assets more efficiently. [...] 2. Talk to more prospective customers faster with ConversAI — a personal chat assistant that generates engaging responses to any message.

3. AI integrations like OpenAI in HubSpot CRM can be used to identify customer pain points based on job titles and other prospect details, as well as drafting effective outbound messaging for email marketing and LinkedIn outreach.

4. Also built on OpenAI, AI Assist by airfocus is a product management platform you can use to generate problem statements or new product ideas, analyze user feedback sentiment, simplify technical jargon, and write product documentation faster.

5. Go Holler lets you create one-question surveys and receive AI-driven insights to identify trends and patterns in your data.
